name: Almond Shortbread Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and sugar.
3. Add the softened butter, egg yolk, and almond extract to the flour mixture.
4. Beat at low speed until the ingredients are finely combined, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Press the dough evenly onto a greased jelly-roll pan (15x10x1 inch).
6. In a small bowl, beat the egg white and water until frothy.
7. Brush the egg wash over the dough.
8. Sprinkle chopped almonds on top of the dough.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into portions (serves about 2 1/2 dozen).
